metadata.search_summary:
Brooklyn is renowned for its vibrant and diverse pizza scene, offering a plethora of pizzerias that cater to various tastes. Here are ten notable pizza places in Brooklyn, each with its unique appeal:

**[Di Fara Pizza](https://www.difarapizzany.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Pizza restaurant · $10–20 · 4.2 (4605 reviews)**  
_1424 Avenue J, Brooklyn, NY 11230_  
Established in 1965, Di Fara Pizza is a Midwood institution, often hailed as one of the best pizzerias in New York City. Known for its handcrafted pies topped with high-quality ingredients, it has garnered a loyal following over the decades.

**[Roberta's](https://www.robertaspizza.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Pizza restaurant · $20–30 · 4.4 (2118 reviews)**  
_261 Moore St, Brooklyn, NY 11206_  
Situated in Bushwick, Roberta's is celebrated for its innovative toppings and rustic ambiance. The pizzeria has gained international acclaim for its unique approach to traditional pizza.

**[L&B Spumoni Gardens](https://spumonigardens.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Italian restaurant · $$ · 4.6 (11273 reviews)**  
_2725 86th St, Brooklyn, NY 11223_  
A Bensonhurst staple since 1939, L&B Spumoni Gardens is famed for its Sicilian 'upside-down' pizza, where the sauce is placed atop the cheese, creating a distinct flavor profile.

**[Juliana’s](https://www.julianaspizza.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Pizza restaurant · $20–30 · 4.6 (6726 reviews)**  
_19 Old Fulton St, Brooklyn, NY 11201_  
Located in DUMBO, Juliana's offers classic New York-style pizza with a modern twist. Its wood-fired pies and scenic waterfront views make it a favorite among locals and visitors alike.

**[L'industrie Pizzeria - Williamsburg](http://www.lindustriebk.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Pizza restaurant · $10–20 · 4.7 (5519 reviews)**  
_254 S 2nd St, Brooklyn, NY 11211_  
Located in Williamsburg, L'Industrie Pizzeria is known for its crispy thin-crust pizzas and creative toppings, blending traditional techniques with modern flavors.

**[Best Pizza](http://www.bestpizzawilliamsburg.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Pizza restaurant · $10–20 · 4.5 (2060 reviews)**  
_33 Havemeyer St, Brooklyn, NY 11211_  
Also in Williamsburg, Best Pizza offers wood-fired pies with a perfect balance of crispy and chewy crust, using high-quality ingredients and classic flavors.

Each of these pizzerias offers a distinct experience, contributing to Brooklyn's rich and diverse pizza culture.
